nasb.text: So he departed from Elisha and returned to his master, who said to him, “What did Elisha say to you?” And he answered, “He told me that you would surely recover.”

esv.text: Then he departed from Elisha and came to his master, who said to him, “What did Elisha say to you?” And he answered, “He told me that you would certainly recover.”

cnv.text: 於是他離開以利沙，回到他主人那裡。便．哈達對他說：“以利沙對你說了些甚麼呢？”他說：“他對我說：‘你一定痊愈的。’”

ccb.text: 哈薛辞别以利沙回去了。王问他：“以利沙对你说什么？”他答道：“以利沙告诉我，你一定会痊愈。”
